channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Nasdaq links EU markets to Boerse Stuttgart's tokenized settlement venue
item.description: The partnership aims to reduce fragmentation in European capital markets by enabling blockchain-based settlement of tokenized securities.

item.title: Bitcoin Die-Hard Jack Dorsey Doesn't Like Stablecoins, But Block Will Use Them Anyway
item.description: Jack Dorsey has long been Bitcoin-focused. So why is Block building stablecoin support into Cash App?

item.title: Aon tests stablecoin payments for insurance premiums with Paxos, Coinbase
item.description: The insurance broker is piloting stablecoin payments for premiums using USDC and PYUSD, testing blockchain settlement rails for faster payments in global insurance markets.

item.title: How the war in Iran and trader positioning could be behind the surge in Circle's stock
item.description: Shares were up another 9.7% on Monday, bringing them nearly to double over the past month.

item.title: Zcash Outpaces Bitcoin Gains as Key Development Team Raises $25 Million
item.description: Prominent privacy coin Zcash (ZEC) has jumped 7% over the last day as the Zcash Open Development Lab announced a $25 million fundraise.

item.title: Anthropic Sues Trump Admin Over 'Supply Chain Risk' Designation
item.description: The AI company filed a lawsuit in federal court after the Pentagon blacklisted Claude over restrictions on military use.

item.title: Crypto and stocks add to gains as Trump says Iran war could be over soon
item.description: It's been a historic 24 hours for crude oil, which soared to $120 per barrel overnight on Iran worries, but has plunged back to just above $80.

item.title: Bitcoin Price Bounces, But Bears Are Still in Control: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin broke the descending triangle with a massive candle—then crept right back inside. Today, it's trying again, but the daily chart isn't convincing.

item.title: Sharplink Posts $734 Million Loss as Ethereum Staking Revenue Soars
item.description: The Ethereum-buying firm attributed its full-year performance to the asset’s volatility.

item.title: Wyoming Senator revives crypto tax exemption debate amid market structure talks
item.description: Cynthia Lummis continues to push pro-crypto policies in a market structure bill under consideration in the Senate, even as she prepares to leave Congress in January 2027.

item.title: Coinbase Debuts Crypto Futures for European Traders, Including Bitcoin and Ethereum
item.description: Coinbase launched regulated crypto futures in 26 European countries, offering perpetual and dated contracts with up to 10x leverage.

item.title: Price predictions 3/9: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, ADA, BCH
item.description: Buyers were undeterred by surging oil prices, pushing Bitcoin near $69,500 and large-cap altcoins close to their overhead resistance levels.

item.title: Blockchain.com expands into Ghana after 700% trading growth in Nigeria
item.description: The crypto brokerage said increasing demand across West Africa is driving its expansion as user activity grows across the Sub-Saharan region.

item.title: Nigel Farage Backs Bitcoin Treasury Firm Chaired By Former Chancellor
item.description: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage has joined the $333,000 fundraising round for Stack BTC alongside Blockchain.com.

item.title: Can you still mine Bitcoin on a PC in 2026? Here is the reality
item.description: Mining Bitcoin on a desktop in 2026 may sound simple, but is it profitable? Do rising network difficulty and energy costs mean the end of PCs as Bitcoin mining equipment?

item.title: 🔥 UPDATE: Ethereum Foundation taps Bitwise infrastructure for treasury staking, targeting 70K $ETH staked. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFB4UUxWRWN5VC1BYWVEaFFGSG5nbG9iTGNiUDRRSHY3dklxelhqZmdnQjhVQURrakxRZDk3UWJZcThHa2lnN1VZUmI3YXBmbWZaVVNmMV91RnJHSC1QbUZwZ1BueUo?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 UPDATE: Ethereum Foundation …

item.title: Ether holds $2K as traders make push toward overhead short liquidity
item.description: Ether's short liquidity may be the next target for bullish traders who have piled into fresh leveraged positions. Is $2,500 the next stop for ETH price?

item.title: Bitcoin could be the big winner if the U.S.-Iran conflict drags on for months
item.description: Macro strategist Mark Connors says war-driven spending, rising debt and lower interest rates could support bitcoin.

item.title: Bitcoin rises to $69,000, stocks reverse big early losses, as crude oil sinks back below $100
item.description: WTI crude oil, which soared nearly 30% to $120 per barrel overnight, has pulled back to $95, easing pressure on risk assets.

item.title: EU’s regulated blockchain securities market adds first bank participant
item.description: Swiss crypto bank Amina has joined 21X as a regulated banking participant, linking traditional financial institutions with a blockchain-based market for issuing tokenized securities.

item.title: Bitcoin price retags $69K as G7 oil plan hangs in the balance
item.description: Bitcoin managed to avoid losses suffered by global stock markets over oil supply uncertainty, with a 5% relief bounce from its weekly open level.

item.title: Josh Swihart's Zcash Open Development Lab raises $25 million in seed funding
item.description: The capital will be used to expand development of the Zcash (ZEC) protocol and its privacy-focused self-custodial mobile wallet, Zodl.

item.title: Global insurance broker Aon tests stablecoin payments with Coinbase, Paxos
item.description: The firm used USDC on Ethereum and PayPal USD on Solana for insurance premium payments, testing how stablecoins could reshape settlements.

item.title: XRP holders face $50B in unrealized losses as it trades below $1.40
item.description: 60% of XRP's circulating supply trades underwater at $1.35, with spot ETF outflows and weak sentiment adding pressure on the bulls amid the current slump.

item.title: Stock market volatility hits one-year high, possibly marking bitcoin bottom
item.description: Bitcoin has its own volatility gauge (BVIV), and that spiked in early February, suggesting crypto markets may have already experienced their panic phase.

item.title: Strategy Drops $1.28 Billion on Bitcoin, Issues $377 Million in Preferred Shares
item.description: Michael Saylor declared the start of a “second century,” following the firm’s 100th Bitcoin purchase last month.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF Flows Cool to $619 Million as Oil Prices Spike
item.description: Crypto funds saw $619M weekly inflow as oil spikes triggered late outflows, with experts split on whether Bitcoin can withstand macro pressure.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Rebounds to $69K as Oil Skyrockets, Then Cools
item.description: Bitcoin and other crypto coins are rising as oil's surge cools, Polymarket and Kalshi are reportedly raising at massive valuations, and more.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: BREAKING: Over 20 million of Bitcoin's 21 million supply cap has officially been mined. Less than 1 million left. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE10WEplaDk4RWxQU3NuZDNpTEFiZ0c0Yl8yV195SXVLR2FqSVRWdzcxR2dqTVZXajdNc2RycnpzaXF2ZzEyQWxMSlBJSUM3cUFlZnl4UkJEN21RVVQ5cTVRemIzMjkxUWc?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Over 20 million o…

item.title: Bithumb faces possible six-month partial suspension in South Korea
item.description: Crypto exchange Bithumb risks a partial business suspension for negligence around money laundering and customer verification practices, according to local media reports.

item.title: How United Nations Development Programme is using blockchains for public infrastructure
item.description: A new United Nations Development Programme report outlines how blockchain can support public systems.

item.title: Ethereum Rises to $2,000 as Tom Lee's BitMine Tops Up $9 Billion ETH Treasury
item.description: The price of Ethereum is up 4% over the last day, rebounding after a weekend slump under $2,000 as BitMine reveals its latest ETH buy.

item.title: 'Mini crypto winter' nearly over, says Tom Lee as Bitmine ramps up pace of ether acquisition
item.description: The company now holds more than 4.5 million ETH, worth over $9 billion, though it is sitting on a loss of nearly $8 billion.

item.title: Nasdaq Partners With Kraken for Tokenized Stocks, Launching 2027
item.description: The initiative is geared towards modernizing processes including corporate actions, shareholder engagement and proxy voting.

item.title: 🔥 BREAKING: Bitcoin has now crossed 20,000,000 $BTC mined. The final 1M $BTC will take another 114 years to mine. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5EUWlsVVIzRGlQaWF1SlBBWE5aVXhnWEowZDJWZXo3dDhQdFJucG9oSGRHZGxTcktOT0F6NFc5TEptSUlUbDZldEVNQTZpUkYzSEhVdHhRaF9KbTBnZ2pRMER5UjI?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BREAKING: Bitcoin has now cr…

item.title: Bitcoiners celebrate as the network produces its 20 millionth coin
item.description: “A digital money system with transparent, predictable, and ultimately scarce supply... has rising appeal in today’s economy due to fiat currency tail risks," said Grayscale.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 Performance Update: Avalanche (AVAX) Gains 2% as Index Trades Flat
item.description: Internet Computer (ICP), up 1.4% from Friday, was also among the top performers.

item.title: Crypto doesn’t belong in AI portfolio as it’s ‘a different animal,’ says tech investor and former Snap exec
item.description: Former Snap strategy chief and Credit Suisse banker says crypto sits outside his AI thesis.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Treasury reports to Congress that using Bitcoin and crypto privacy mixers are NOT unlawful: "Lawful users of digital assets may leverage mixers to enable financial privacy when transacting through public blockchains." Big win for privacy! 👏 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9rNHkwVktXM1EzQ1IwcEJ1RUFSVnRLTzlrajBFMUdFb0xMWVRRMzRybXlVTnZoZXVXXzRnejJaZEhnWC1aQWF6aUpjZHM2YjZTcjFyNlloVlQ3M3V6dlNpdEdaUUVXUTg?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Treasury r…

item.title: Vienna-based Startup Launches AI Pipeline Builder for Gaming Studios
item.description: The platform uses multiple AI agents to generate and optimize game assets as studios increasingly experiment with AI in production.

item.title: Banks will run RWAs on two blockchain rails, says RedStone co-founder
item.description: RedStone co-founder Marcin Kaźmierczak says banks are splitting RWA infrastructure between private networks like Canton and public chains such as Ethereum.

item.title: Strategy buys $1.3B in Bitcoin as holdings top 738,000 BTC
item.description: The purchase brings Strategy’s total Bitcoin reserves to nearly 739,000 BTC despite the asset trading below the company’s average acquisition price.

item.title: KAST raises $80 million at $600 million valuation to expand stablecoin payments platform
item.description: Funding will support product expansion, licensing and compliance as the company scales a platform for cross-border stablecoin payments.

item.title: Bithumb faces proposed 6-month partial ban over South Korea AML breaches
item.description: The suspension, according to local media reports, would only restrict virtual asset transfers for newly registered users, not affecting existing customer operations.

item.title: Stablecoin payments startup Kast raises $80M at $600M valuation: Report
item.description: Stablecoin banking startup Kast secured fresh funding as it looks to expand payment infrastructure across North America, Latin America and the Middle East.

item.title: Nigel Farage invests $286K in UK Bitcoin treasury company Stack BTC
item.description: Nigel Farage has acquired a 6.31% stake in the London-listed Bitcoin treasury company Stack BTC amid broader scrutiny over crypto donations in UK politics.

item.title: U.S. Treasury signals shift on crypto mixers, acknowledges legitimate privacy uses
item.description: A congressional report on implementing the Genius Act acknowledges the existence of lawful uses for blockchain privacy tools even as U.S. regulators pursue enforcement cases tied to illicit finance.

item.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy made $1.3 billion bitcoin purchase last week
item.description: The company now holds 738,731 bitcoin purchased for about $56 billion and worth roughly $50 billion at the current price just shy of $68,000.

item.title: BREAKING: Michael Saylor's Strategy purchased 17,994 Bitcoin for $1.28 BILLION 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBERmhhX2UxVDBhUlBIcHNmNGNjMHFpeVo2aDBmYkFXUnNHeUxjRnc1T3A1ejhZQWZRTTFMZW9yTmNSVzkzbkZqZml0aDJfOEY5dmpjWk5rT1NYLUY0R3BRUnN2dUtFZjQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Michael Saylor's …

item.title: Strategy has acquired 17,994 BTC for ~$1.28 billion at ~$70,946 per bitcoin. As of 3/8/2026, we hodl 738,731 $BTC acquired for ~$56.04 billion at ~$75,862 per bitcoin. $MSTR $STRC - x.com

item.title: Bybit doubles down on Middle East operations amid regional tensions
item.description: It’s estimated that roughly 1,800 crypto companies operate in the United Arab Emirates, employing more than 8,600 people in various roles.

item.title: Nasdaq partners with Kraken for issuer-centric tokenized equities
item.description: Nasdaq and Kraken will enable tokenized equities to move between regulated and onchain markets while preserving issuer rights and regulatory compliance.

item.title: Bitcoin is beating stocks and gold as the Middle East conflict rattles global markets
item.description: Bitcoin has outperformed precious metals and U.S. equities since the war in Iran first began, softening sentiment after a rough start to the year.

item.title: Bitcoin stays calm while other markets panic: key levels to watch
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 9, 2026

item.title: Nasdaq and Kraken are teaming up to let you trade tokenized stocks
item.description: Nasdaq plans to work with Kraken to distribute tokenized versions of public stocks globally as the exchange pushes to bring blockchain infrastructure into traditional markets.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Nasdaq partners with Kraken for tokenized stock trading. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE11dElyTUw4STJER0wyc2hyYm9fcVc1Z1loRzREOU9OTVpUaTQzSUtteHdfN2FRS3ZDVTMxMURwUm03ZHMtRGU1eWVEbGNmREpXUkcweDZPOVNTR2gxemdVOHZB?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Nasdaq partners with K…

item.title: U.S. inflation, Polkadot upgrade, Solstice-Kamino announcement: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting March 9.

item.title: Bitcoin rises as oil spikes, equities drop
item.description: Bitcoin climbed during European trading hours even as U.S. equity futures, gold and silver fell, highlighting its relative resilience to oil shocks and war risks.

item.title: Nigel Farage takes 6% stake in UK bitcoin treasury firm Stack BTC
item.description: Reform UK leader backs London-listed company chaired by former Chancellor Kwasi Kwarteng as it expands bitcoin strategy.
